label: Easy
description: Single-file authorization regression with an obvious missing admin check.
summary: A PR introduces an export endpoint for admin reports. The diff adds authentication but never verifies the caller has the admin role.
issue_body: Users without admin role can access the export endpoint after this patch because the handler only checks for authentication.

diffs.routes/admin.py:
@@
-@router.get("/reports/export")
-def export_reports(user=Depends(require_user)):
-    if not user:
-        raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="login required")
+@router.get("/reports/export")
+def export_reports(user=Depends(require_user)):
+    if not user:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="login required")
     return export_service.run()
